titleStmt.title: SII 16.86: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 86. (A.R. No. 15 of 1915.) ŚRĪŚAILAM, NANDIKOTKUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into the floor of the platform in the northern porch of the mukhamaṇḍapa of the Mallikārjuna temple, to the left of entrance.
This is dated Śaka 1450 (current), Virōdhi, Kārtika śu. 15, Sunday. The Śaka year quoted is wrong for 1451 for which the details correspond to 1529 A.D., October 17 (lunar eclipse).

It register the grant of the village Gaṭṭirājupeṇṭa in Sīdhāpuram-sīma to Rāchūṭi Vīraṇṇoḍaya of Basava-maṭham by Avasaram Chandraśēkharayya for the merit of the king and his father-in-law Dēmarusayya. The village which was a gift for offerings to god Mallikārjuna, was constituted into an agrahāra to be enjoyed by the donee and his successive disciples.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1450 Agu
nēṭi virōdhi saṁvatsara kā¨rttika śu 15 Ā śrīmatu [A]vasaraṁ caṁdraśēkhara
yyavāru basvamaṭhaṁ rācūṭi vīraṇṇoḍayalaku yicina bhūdāna dharmaśāsanaṁ
śrīmallikā¨rjunadēvuni Amṛtapaḷaku celli siddāpuraṁ sīmalōni gaṭṭirājupe
ṁṭa Anē grāmaṁ mīku Agrahāraṁ cēsi śrī kṛṣṇarāyamahārāyalaku pu
ṇyaṁgāmaṁnu nū māma dēmarusayavāriki puṇyaṁgānuṁnu ga
ṭirājupeṁṭa Anē grāmaṁ dāravōsi yistimi mī siṣyapāraṁparya
ṁgānu Ācaṁdrā¨rkkastāyigānu dānādikrayālaku yōgyamai
śrīśailanāthanisaṁnidhini sivapūja cēsukoni sukhāna puṁḍēdi Ani
yiccina dharmaśāsanaṁ gaṭirājupeṁṭa vāru Ayyaṁgāri kolluma
sikharapurā naku Ā vūriki tū
rpu ku pālakollu dakṣiṇānaku mādināyanipalle kanuma paḍa
maṭiki rudamūru vuttarānaku tūṁgūḍu yī varusa
lōnu nidhinikṣēpaṁjalapāṣāṇasiddhasādhyaṁbulu mōdalugānu
bhōgasvāmyālu Anubhaviṁcci sukhāna vuṁḍēdi Iṭani
yiccina bhūdāna dharmaśāsanaṁ . svadattānāṁ paradattānā
ṁ yō harēti vasuṁdharā . ṣaṣṭhi¨rva¨rṣasahasrāṇi vi
ṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . śrī . To the left side of the inscription are engraved across in later and different characters.
kākunūri timaya
śrīmallikā¨rjunadēvuni-
ki daṁḍaṁ sama¨rpiṁcanu
maṣaya
koṁce varasayanu
dēvarakoṁḍa tōṭiyya
�ppini rāmaliṁgaṁ
cuṁḍenu śrī Lines 4 to 7 do not run on. Of them line 7 is written topsy turvy and line 8, by the side of the lines 5 to 7.
Digital edition of SII 16.86 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
